languages.text: "Любопытно, то есть твоя гальваническая батарея не только копит энергию, но и перераспределяет ее туда, куда ты указываешь. А подпитываешь ты ее, судя по всему, вытягивая энергию из прочих источников".
"Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."
languages.original_text: "Любопытно, то есть твоя гальваническая батарея не только копит энергию, но и перераспределяет ее туда, куда ты указываешь. А подпитываешь ты ее, судя по всему, вытягивая энергию из прочих источников".

traits.locale_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."
"Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."
"Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

languages.text: 「興味深いですね。あなたの電気化学電池は、エネルギーを貯蔵するだけでなく、どこに送るのかを指示すれば、その場所にエネルギーを再分配するのです。そして、エネルギーを他の源から引き出すことで、電池を動かすのですね。」
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

languages.text: "Faszinierend. Eure galvanische Zelle speichert Energie also nicht nur, sondern verteilt sie wie Ihr wollt. Und Ihr betreibt sie offenbar, indem Ihr anderen Quellen Energie entzieht."
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

traits.locale_text: "Faszinierend. Eure galvanische Zelle speichert Energie also nicht nur, sondern verteilt sie wie Ihr wollt. Und Ihr betreibt sie offenbar, indem Ihr anderen Quellen Energie entzieht."

languages.text: «Intrigante. De modo que su célula galvánica no solo almacena energía, sino que también puede redistribuirla a voluntad. Y según parece, funciona extrayendo esa energía de otras fuentes».
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

traits.locale_text: «Intrigante. De modo que su célula galvánica no solo almacena energía, sino que también puede redistribuirla a voluntad. Y según parece, funciona extrayendo esa energía de otras fuentes».

languages.text: "İlginç. Yani galvaniz hücren sadece enerji depolamakla kalmıyor, aynı zamanda yönlendirdiğin her yere yeniden dağıtıyor. Ayrıca gördüğüm kadarıyla hücreyi diğer kaynaklardan enerji çekerek besliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

traits.locale_text: "İlginç. Yani galvaniz hücren sadece enerji depolamakla kalmıyor, aynı zamanda yönlendirdiğin her yere yeniden dağıtıyor. Ayrıca gördüğüm kadarıyla hücreyi diğer kaynaklardan enerji çekerek besliyorsun."

languages.text: « Intéressant. Votre cellule galvanique ne se contente donc pas de stocker l'énergie, elle la redistribue également selon votre volonté. Et, selon toute vraisemblance, vous l'alimentez en puisant de l'énergie dans d'autres sources. »
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

traits.locale_text: « Intéressant. Votre cellule galvanique ne se contente donc pas de stocker l'énergie, elle la redistribue également selon votre volonté. Et, selon toute vraisemblance, vous l'alimentez en puisant de l'énergie dans d'autres sources. »

languages.text: “有意思。如此说来，你的原电池不仅可以储存能量，还能将能量重新导向你指定的任何地方。而你似乎可以从其他来源汲取能量来为其供能。”
languages.original_text: "Intriguing. So your galvanic cell not only stores energy, but also redistributes it to wherever you direct it. And you power it, seemingly, by drawing energy from other sources."

traits.locale_text: “有意思。如此说来，你的原电池不仅可以储存能量，还能将能量重新导向你指定的任何地方。而你似乎可以从其他来源汲取能量来为其供能。”
